---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that the plugin makes hard today?

**Proposed change**
What you'd like to see. Keep in mind the plugin is intentionally lean and dependency-free,
and the two disciplines (source-verify before you etch; no chat in the doc) are load-bearing.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've already tried or ruled out.
